locations.summary: 彼得·博达尔特（荷蘭語：Pieter Boddaert，發音：[ˈpitər ˈbɔdaːrt]；1733年5月26日—1795年5月6日）是一名荷蘭的醫生及博物學家。 博塔埃特的父親是米德爾堡的法學家及詩人(1694–1760)。與其父…

locations.name: 南美洲
locations.summary: 南亚美利加洲（英语：South America），简称南美洲，为七大洲之一，位於西半球南部（或南半球），西臨南太平洋，西面為太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊。太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊之間的內營力為張力，衍生了東太平洋海嶺；而納斯卡板塊與南美洲板塊的內…

locations.name: 巴西

locations.name: 特立尼达岛

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔

relations.subject: White-winged swallow

relations.subject: White-winged swallow
relations.evidence: Occasional vagrants reach Panama. They are usually not found on the Pacific coast, especially in the southern portion of South America. The species is usually found in or near lowland areas along bodies of water such as rivers or lakes, at elevations of about . It is resident in most of its range, although in the most southerly part it is migratory
